step_name: Browser: Verify Overview tab — member perspective
instruction: Navigate to /team/page-test as the non-leader member. Verify: 1. Team Info Card: leader shows as jayant.jayants-macbook-pro (NOT responder) 2. StatsGrid: "Members: 1/1 active", "Projects: 1" 3. GettingStartedBanner should NOT appear (non-leader members don't see it) 4. NO offered subscription banner (already accepted) Take a screenshot.

expect.description: Member sees correct leader, stats, no GettingStartedBanner
